name: 新星 | 古董枪
descriptionEn: The Nova's rock-bottom price tag makes it a great ambush weapon for a cash-strapped team. It has been painted using a combination of hydrographics and dry-transfer decals to create the look of a wood stock and gold inlay. With age comes wisdom and stopping power
descriptionZh: 廉价的新星对于手头紧的玩家来说是一把不错的伏击武器。 这把武器将花纹和干式转印贴花结合起来，然后进行了涂装，以创造出木制品和黄金镶嵌的视觉效果。 随着岁月增长的除了智慧，还有杀伤力
